calendar.matters:
MOTION For Assignment Per Court Order.
Off Calendar Jun-03-2010 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Apr-08-2010 Continued To May-06-10 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-09-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 10:57am
Judge Pro Tem Charlene Rosack, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525:
Appellant, Fakhry Salim Sweis, appears through counsel, David Hunter (no appearance by appellant, Khalid Ismail El Sayed); Respondent, Bryan Allen Templin, appears in Pro Per.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from the Judge.
Appellant, Mr. Templin, objects to a motion to vacate the judgment, claiming it was untimely. Judge Rosack advises Mr. Templin the matter is submitted, with a ruling to follow. The hearing on the appeal proceeds. Mr. Templin calls Andy Esquy, previously sworn, to testify. Mr. Hunter recalls Andy Esquy for further questioning. Mr. Hunter questions Mr. Sweis.
EXHR(A) Inclusive documentation, multiple pages and photos
11:45am
Matter is submitted. Evidence is marked and retained by the Court.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2009 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-14-2009 Judgment Entered
